Package cc.quaternion.potshaper

Enum Class PotAlignment

java.lang.Object
java.lang.Enum<PotAlignment>
cc.quaternion.potshaper.PotAlignment
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable, Comparable<PotAlignment>, Constable
public enum PotAlignment extends Enum<PotAlignment>
Enumerates text alignment options for presentation shapes, providing mapping to and from Apache POI alignment constants.

This enum defines a set of standard text alignment values used within the library. Each constant corresponds to a specific TextParagraph.TextAlign value from the Apache POI library, enabling seamless conversion between the library's internal representation and POI's model for text paragraph alignment. The mapping is bidirectional, supporting both conversion to POI alignments and construction from POI alignments.

Since:
1.0
Author:
Quaternion8192

  • Nested Class Summary

    Nested classes/interfaces inherited from class java.lang.Enum

    Enum.EnumDesc<E extends Enum<E>>

  • Enum Constant Summary

    Enum Constants
    Enum Constant
    Description
    CENTER
    Centers text horizontally within the shape.
    DISTRIBUTED
    Distributes text evenly across the width of the shape, typically adjusting character spacing.
    JUSTIFY
    Justifies text, adding space between words so that lines reach both the left and right margins.
    JUSTIFY_LOW
    Justifies text using a low-resolution algorithm, often for specific typographic or compatibility purposes.
    LEFT
    Aligns text to the left margin of the shape.
    RIGHT
    Aligns text to the right margin of the shape.

  • Enum Constant Details

    • LEFT

      public static final PotAlignment LEFT
      Aligns text to the left margin of the shape.

    • CENTER

      public static final PotAlignment CENTER
      Centers text horizontally within the shape.

    • RIGHT

      public static final PotAlignment RIGHT
      Aligns text to the right margin of the shape.

    • JUSTIFY

      public static final PotAlignment JUSTIFY
      Justifies text, adding space between words so that lines reach both the left and right margins.

    • DISTRIBUTED

      public static final PotAlignment DISTRIBUTED
      Distributes text evenly across the width of the shape, typically adjusting character spacing.

    • JUSTIFY_LOW

      public static final PotAlignment JUSTIFY_LOW
      Justifies text using a low-resolution algorithm, often for specific typographic or compatibility purposes.

  • Method Details

    • values

      public static PotAlignment[] values()
      Returns an array containing the constants of this enum class, in the order they are declared.
      Returns:
      an array containing the constants of this enum class, in the order they are declared

    • valueOf

      public static PotAlignment valueOf(String name)
      Returns the enum constant of this class with the specified name. The string must match exactly an identifier used to declare an enum constant in this class. (Extraneous whitespace characters are not permitted.)
      Parameters:
      name - the name of the enum constant to be returned.
      Returns:
      the enum constant with the specified name
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if this enum class has no constant with the specified name
      NullPointerException - if the argument is null

    • toPoiAlign

      public org.apache.poi.sl.usermodel.TextParagraph.TextAlign toPoiAlign()
      Converts this alignment constant to its corresponding Apache POI TextAlign value.

      This method performs a direct mapping from the enum constant to the equivalent POI alignment constant. It is the primary method for obtaining the POI representation of this alignment. The fallback for any unrecognized state (which should not occur) is TextParagraph.TextAlign.LEFT.

      Usage Example

      
 PotAlignment alignment = PotAlignment.CENTER;
 TextParagraph.TextAlign poiAlign = alignment.toPoiAlign();
 // poiAlign is now TextParagraph.TextAlign.CENTER
      Returns:
      the corresponding TextParagraph.TextAlign constant, never null.
      See Also:
      • TextParagraph.TextAlign

    • toPoiTextAlign

      public org.apache.poi.sl.usermodel.TextParagraph.TextAlign toPoiTextAlign()
      Converts this alignment constant to its corresponding Apache POI TextAlign value.

      This method is an alias for toPoiAlign(). It provides an alternative, more explicit name for the conversion operation, returning the same result as toPoiAlign().

      Usage Example

      
 PotAlignment alignment = PotAlignment.RIGHT;
 TextParagraph.TextAlign poiAlign = alignment.toPoiTextAlign();
 // poiAlign is now TextParagraph.TextAlign.RIGHT
      Returns:
      the corresponding TextParagraph.TextAlign constant, never null.
      See Also:
      • toPoiAlign()

    • fromPoiAlign

      public static PotAlignment fromPoiAlign(org.apache.poi.sl.usermodel.TextParagraph.TextAlign poiAlign)
      Converts an Apache POI TextAlign value to the corresponding PotAlignment enum constant.

      This static method performs the inverse mapping of toPoiAlign(). It translates a POI alignment constant into the library's internal alignment enum. If the provided poiAlign is null, the method returns LEFT as a default value. If the POI alignment does not match any known mapping, LEFT is also returned as a fallback.

      Usage Example

      
 TextParagraph.TextAlign poiAlignment = TextParagraph.TextAlign.JUSTIFY;
 PotAlignment potAlignment = PotAlignment.fromPoiAlign(poiAlignment);
 // potAlignment is now PotAlignment.JUSTIFY
      Parameters:
      poiAlign - the Apache POI text alignment constant to convert; may be null.
      Returns:
      the corresponding PotAlignment constant, or LEFT if the input is null or does not match a known mapping.
      See Also:
      • TextParagraph.TextAlign
      • toPoiAlign()
